title: Samsung Averts a Walkout With Big Bonuses, but Discord Over A.I. Profits Brews
summary_full: Samsung Electronics, a global memory chip supplier, has been a major beneficiary of the A.I boom. It has also become the center of a debate over how to divide its spoils.
summary_public: Samsung Electronics, a global memory chip supplier, has been a major beneficiary of the A.I boom. It has also become the center of a debate over how to divide its spoils.
